problem id: 0528d502
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(3) AND NOT SHR(4)) XOR NOT SHL(4)

examples:
  01110100 -> 00011111
  11000111 -> 10111101
  01110010 -> 01001111
  01111000 -> 10111111
  00001010 -> 00001111
  01100001 -> 11100110
  01110001 -> 01100111
  10110111 -> 00111011
  01011000 -> 10111101
  11000100 -> 10011101

query: 00110100
predicted answer: 00011111
